project.name: HSF302_FPTU_Library_System
project.type: Spring Boot MVC - Thư viện FPTU
project.status: Development - Bùi Minh Chiến's tasks are done

business_rules: Borrow Request lifecycle: PENDING -> WAITING (Approved) -> ISSUED -> RETURNED
Missing business rule: The system currently stops at WAITING. The ISSUED state (which creates BorrowHistory) is missing from teammate's code.
Only readers can make borrow/new book requests

gotchas: Teammate's AWS S3 keys are dummy. Real keys must be added in a gitignored application-secret.properties loaded via spring.profiles.include=secret
Missing ISSUED transition in teammate's BorrowRequest code causes BorrowHistory to remain empty. Requires manual data insertion into data.sql for testing UI dependent on BorrowHistory.
conventions: Use CommonFunction.getCurrentUser() for securing user identification
